warning: This worklist creates reviewer starter objects only. It does not approve cases, change scoring truth, or replace emergency clinician and medical educator adjudication.

risk_flags.reviewer_prompt: Confirm stabilization priorities, unsafe delays, and whether the ESI label remains appropriate for the public scenario.
Confirm disposition truth and the minimum learner handoff elements for admission.
Confirm expected resource profile and whether resource prediction feedback should be case-specific or range-based.
Review ESI rationale carefully because the source adjudication required disagreement resolution.
Confirm outcome timing and whether it should shape reassessment or disposition teaching.
Confirm which interventions are expected learner actions versus observed historical utilization.
Resolve age mismatch before national release or explain which age should be displayed.

truth_decision_prompts.prompt: Record the best adjudicated diagnosis and acceptable differential diagnoses; keep draft working diagnoses out of summative scoring until approved.
Decide whether consultation, admission service, transfer, or discharge follow-up should be considered correct for this case.
Confirm source-record outcome truth, timing, disposition rationale, and any critical escalation triggers.
Specify objective data that may be revealed on learner request, including normal/negative findings that are safe to disclose.

release_blockers.description: No completed case_truth_adjudications.json entry exists for this public case.
The case cannot be counted as national-release case truth until status is adjudicated_ready_for_case_truth.
Reviewer must adjudicate source_record_diagnosis before national release.
Reviewer must adjudicate clinician_approved_referral_or_consult_truth before national release.
Reviewer must adjudicate retrospective_ground_truth before national release.
Reviewer must adjudicate optional_objective_data_truth before national release.
Reviewer must resolve the source/narrative age mismatch before learner-facing national release.
Reviewer must resolve or document the ESI disagreement before summative scoring release.

Reviewer must adjudicate source_record_diagnosis before national release.
Reviewer must adjudicate clinician_approved_referral_or_consult_truth before national release.
Reviewer must adjudicate retrospective_ground_truth before national release.
Reviewer must adjudicate optional_objective_data_truth before national release.

scope.review_scope: ESI truth, diagnosis/referral truth, stabilization priorities, objective-data reveal safety, disposition, and unsafe feedback blockers

risk_flags.reviewer_prompt: Resolve age mismatch before national release or explain which age should be displayed.

truth_decision_prompts.prompt: Record the best adjudicated diagnosis and acceptable differential diagnoses; keep draft working diagnoses out of summative scoring until approved.
Decide whether consultation, admission service, transfer, or discharge follow-up should be considered correct for this case.
Confirm source-record outcome truth, timing, disposition rationale, and any critical escalation triggers.
Specify objective data that may be revealed on learner request, including normal/negative findings that are safe to disclose.
